message: Remember I prefer dark mode in all my apps.
I always take the window seat on flights.
I'm building a Next.js analytics dashboard for my startup.
Never use emojis when you answer me.
I'm vegetarian and my sister Mia is allergic to peanuts.
Remember I live in Boston, I'm allergic to shellfish, and my anniversary is May 3.
I usually work late on weekdays and I prefer async standups.
Remember I fly out of SFO, I hate red-eye flights, and I always pack carry-on only.
Please answer me in a concise, formal tone.
For context, I'm a staff data engineer at a fintech company.
I no longer use Postgres; I switched to Snowflake for the warehouse.
My editor is Neovim and I deploy everything on Railway.
I want all code examples in TypeScript, not JavaScript.
My daughter's name is Ada and she turns 5 in October.
Don't include external links in your answers.
What did I say my favorite food was?
Can you summarize the last quarter's revenue?
Good morning! How are you doing today?
I prefer metric units for everything.
Remember I'm lactose intolerant, I don't drink alcohol, and I love spicy food.
We're building MemoryOps, a governed memory layer for AI assistants.
I like meetings scheduled in the morning, before 11am.
I split my time between Austin and Denver.
Always redact my home address if it ever comes up.
